allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -e bash -lc 'cd /root/projects/gpu-telemetry-pipeline && go version && echo "--- build ---" && go build ./... 2>&1 | head -40')

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -e bash -lc 'which go || ls /usr/local/go/bin 2>/dev/null || ls $HOME/go/bin 2>/dev/null; echo "PATH=$PATH"; for p in /usr/local/go/bin/go /usr/lib/go/bin/go /snap/bin/go $HOME/go/bin/go; do [ -x "$p" ] && echo "found:$p"; done')
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -e bash -lc 'cd /root/projects/gpu-telemetry-pipeline && export PATH=/usr/local/go/bin:$PATH && go version && echo "--- build ---" && go build ./... 2>&1 | head -40')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu bash -lc 'cd /root/projects/gpu-telemetry-pipeline && go build ./... && echo BUILD_OK && go test ./... 2>&1 | tail -20')

Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu bash -lc 'cd /root/projects/gpu-telemetry-pipeline && for c in api collector streamer; do echo "=== $c ==="; helm lint deploy/helm/gpu-telemetry-$c >/dev/null && helm template r deploy/helm/gpu-telemetry-$c -n gpu-telemetry | grep -E "replicas:|minReplicas:|maxReplicas:"; done')
